coldStartQuestions: How does Markmonitor help protect my brand from domain fraud and online abuse?

disclosures.markdown: By messaging, you agree this chat may be monitored, recorded, and used for personalization, analytics, and other business services per our Privacy Policy

payload.plainText: Hi there! I'm Dotty from Markmonitor. Are you exploring ways to protect your brand and manage your domain portfolio more efficiently?
